title: viola formosana var. kawakamii
intro: Viola formosana var. kawakamii is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Viola formosana plant, a type of orchid-flowered violet native to Taiwan. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Viola formosana var. kawakamii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potential applications in treating conditions such as fever and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Viola formosana var. kawakamii typically involve drying the plant's leaves and flowers, followed by infusion or decoction to create a tea or tincture for medicinal use.
